message:
feat(replication): add REPLCONF and PSYNC command stubs for standalone mode

Implement replication handshake commands needed by Redis clients and
monitoring tools that probe replication state:

- REPLCONF: Handle ACK (accept offset acknowledgments), GETACK (return
  ACK 0 for standalone), listening-port/ip-address/capa (accept silently
  during handshake). Unknown subcommands accepted per Redis behavior.
- PSYNC: Always respond with FULLRESYNC using a deterministic 40-char
  replid and offset 0, since we operate as standalone master.
- Wire both commands through dispatch, classify (5-char and 8-char
  length buckets), command table, and ACL admin category.
- Add comprehensive tests: REPLCONF ACK/GETACK/capa/listening-port/arity,
  PSYNC fullresync response/arity, REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF NO ONE, ROLE master.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
